case_title: SWARAN SINGH VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINGH, SWARAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SINGH, SWARAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-23-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SWARAN SINGH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION DEFENDANT CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINGH, SWARAN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEEN GREEN (CLAIMS ADJUSTER) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF SWARAN SINGH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARLEEN GREEN (CLAIMS ADJUSTER). NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT CCSF WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINGH, SWARAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE REQUIREMENT TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ADMINISTRATIVE CLAIM TO DEFENDANT PRIOR TO BRINGING THIS CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-11-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-23-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY SINGH, SWARAN CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2023 - JUDGMENT.
